preserveUserBrands: assets/brands/* except assets/brands/example/ (example is updatable, user brands are not)

featureFlags._doc: Runtime feature flags read at Electron startup. Do NOT rely on these for security-critical defaults — a stale version.json on an offline client stays at the shipped values. Security-critical changes must land as code pushes with a version bump.

notes: v1.21.11: Shopify App-Store install + Wave F audit fixes (NC-ROAS+LTV, currency, Slack tool, international brands) + perf wins. Shopify install: previous flow asked merchants to type their .myshopify.com URL in a modal and bound 127.0.0.1:8392, both rejection-grounds under App Store §2.3.1 / §1.1.12. New flow initiates on Shopify (apps.shopify.com → application_url=/auth/install → /admin/oauth/authorize → /auth/web/callback → /dash/<shop>?handoff=<code> → merlin://oauth-complete?handoff=<code> → run-shopify-handoff IPC → shopify-handoff binary action → /api/handoff/<code> token swap → vault). Handoff codes are 32-byte base64url, 5-min TTL, single-use, license-gated, scope re-verified server-side (Stripe Rule 9 pattern). New shopify_handoff.go (243 LOC, 6 tests) + /connect/shopify and /api/handoff/<code> worker routes + handoff mint in handleAuthWebCallback + CSP-strict meta-refresh page in handleDashboard. Wave F dashboard: NC-ROAS (Shopify customer.orders_count==1, authoritative) + LTV (≥12-month cohort total_spent average) + LTV:CAC + payback months with confidence labels (high/medium/low/none) — surfaces only when data is sufficient, no fake $0 LTV. Wave F currency: new Config.SpendCurrency (default 'usd'); LinkedIn dashboardPullLinkedInSpend now fetches account currency and normalizes costInLocalCurrency through Stripe's exchange_rates/usd table; Shopify shopifyGetOrderMetrics normalizes per-order total_price by each order's currency field. Wave F slack: new slack-post action + mcp__merlin__slack tool — Sarah's Monday digest can now be posted in one tool call. Wave F brand-slug: international brand names (Lalí Cosmetics, Café Reino, Mädchen, Český Krumlov) now slugify cleanly via Latin diacritic fold — Go and JS counterparts agree byte-for-byte. Etsy MCP claim cleaned up (dropped 'etsy ads' from dashboard color map; added regression guard so future PRs can't re-introduce the false claim). Perf wins: chat scroll handler rAF-coalesced + passive listener (was forcing layout on every 120Hz trackpad tick); two prompt-input listeners merged into one; renderMarkdown regexes hoisted to module scope; whisper-cli pinned to -bs 1 -t 4 (greedy decode + 4-thread cap, 2-3× speedup); update-check timers cleared in before-quit (fixes EPIPE-on-shutdown leak). Security: Meta intent-tool spend-approval bypass closed (Codex review finding). Tests: 218s Go suite green, 917 JS green, 352 worker tests green; 6 new Shopify handoff tests + 5 new perf-regression tests + 5 new Wave-F brand-slug tests + 2 currency-FX tests + 4 Etsy honesty tests + 8 LTV tests pinning every fix.
whatsNew: Connect Shopify in one click from the Shopify App Store — no more typing your store URL in a modal. The new install flow is App Store-compliant (you click 'Add app' on apps.shopify.com → approve scopes → land back in Merlin Desktop with your store connected). Returning merchants who reconnect after a long gap no longer get stuck in the 'install loop' some hit on the previous flow.

Dashboard now shows NC-ROAS (revenue from first-time buyers ÷ ad spend) plus LTV, LTV:CAC, and payback in months — with a confidence label so a brand without enough cohort history sees 'no signal yet' instead of a fake $0. NC-ROAS uses Shopify's authoritative orders_count==1 field — not heuristics — so the number you see is the number Shopify says.

Currency-aware spending: brands operating in EUR / GBP / AUD now get an accurate MER. Previously LinkedIn spend in EUR and Shopify revenue in EUR were summed as if they were USD, producing wildly wrong ROAS for non-US brands. Default reporting currency stays USD; non-USD brands see real numbers (when Stripe is connected for FX) or a clear 'mixed currency' note (when it's not).

Faster chat scroll, faster voice transcription, fewer EPIPE errors on quit. Five low-risk perf wins land alongside this release; each one is pinned by a regression test so a future cleanup pass can't silently undo them.

International brand names (Lalí Cosmetics, Café Reino, Mädchen, Český Krumlov) now onboard cleanly — the slugifier handles Latin diacritics + collapses non-alphanumeric runs, and the display name is preserved verbatim in brand.md. Plus: Slack now has a `slack-post` action so the Monday digest skill can hand off to one MCP call instead of asking you to paste manually.
